devdoc.details: Contract for storing ERPNext document hashes and metadata on blockchain

documentExists(bytes32).details: Check if a document hash exists

returns._0: exists Boolean indicating if document exists

params.dataHash: The hash of the document data

returns.eventType: The event type that triggered recording
returns.name: The document name/ID

getDocumentCount().details: Get the count of documents recorded

getDocumentHistoryCount(string,string).details: Get document history length for a specific document

getDocumentHistoryHash(string,string,uin.details: Get a specific history entry hash for a document

returns._0: dataHash Hash of the document at that history point

recordDocument(string,string,string,byte.details: Record a document to the blockchain
